propositions: Freeze two versioned ground-truth corpora (per-ticket outcome corpus and finding-level adjudication corpus) under the plan-review-gate runs directory with a documented README and committed regeneration scripts, changing no source under src/.
Land the SOTA report as committed provenance and re-verify its §5 headline figures against the frozen outcome corpus, marking each derived figure AGREES or CORRECTED per figure.

Derive per-ticket outcome fields (reopen_count, force_close, completion_verifier_fail_count, review_round_count, post_claim_edit_class) via exact event predicates, using a git-object walk across tickets-branch refs because on-disk active+.retired scans are insufficient for compacted tickets whose events fold into SNAPSHOTs.
Build the adjudication corpus bucketing surfaced vs dropped findings by positional coverage.counts split rather than the ambiguous decision field, stratified by criterion.
Originally gated corpus validity on Cohen's kappa >= 0.7 from two independent blind LLM raters, but kappa decayed with sample size (~0.5), so adjudicating findings as TP/FP is genuinely subjective.

Replace the kappa pass/fail gate with honest stratified kappa disclosure plus human adjudication of clustered dispute archetypes as authoritative gold labels, and add incremental atomic checkpointing to the adjudication harness after all-or-nothing writes lost labels on mid-run crash.
